changes.purpose: Forensic decomposition of all 10 chapters — source objects, transformations, narrative ops, human judgment, reproducibility per chapter. Transformation taxonomy (T1–T7). 55/20/25 composition ratio. Implicit 4-stage pipeline discovery.
Formal EIC specification — input contract (CIP), 4 compilation stages, 6 vocabulary systems, governance model, extension architecture, automation boundary.
7 cognitive functions (CF-1 through CF-7) discovered from BlueEdge session. Dependency graph, agent topology, 3 integration models, BlueEdge precedent analysis.
Productization viability — existing product inventory, 5 gaps, revenue models, maturity classification (10 capabilities), risk assessment (5 risks), implementation sequence (6 phases).
